## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or need this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Stakeholder Impact

- **Who benefits:** [e.g., Nursing leadership, clinical staff, other VA facilities]
- **Priority:** [Low / Medium / High / Critical]
- **Requested by:** [Name and department]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.

> **REMINDER:** Do NOT include any PHI/PII in feature descriptions. Use synthetic examples only.
